channel_header: THE ACTIVITY · America's Third Special Mission Unit

gancho_lines.text: Eight Americans dead in the Iranian desert.
The unit was never supposed to be named.
Gray Fox. Centra Spike. Torn Victor. Cemetery Wind.
The Pentagon refused to confirm it existed.

legado_items.label: Special Access Program Cover
legado_items.desc: Budget hidden inside unrelated line items, shielding the unit from Congressional oversight for decades.

legado_items.label: Rotating Cryptonyms
legado_items.desc: Names changed every few years — Orange, Gray Fox, Centra Spike — to defeat journalists and foreign intelligence tracking.

legado_items.label: Military HUMINT Doctrine
legado_items.desc: Permanently ended the Pentagon's reliance on CIA networks, reshaping every special operation since Eagle Claw.

criterio_lines.text: What does a democracy owe the men it officially does not employ?
The Activity was built to ensure no rescue mission would ever fail blind again — and to ensure no one would ever know it was there.
